center.name: Cuban pine forests
center.summary: Cuban pine forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Olive-capped warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive-capped warbler (Setophaga pityophila) is a species of New World warbler that is native to the western and eastern ends of Cuba as well as Grand Bahama and the Abaco Islands in the Bahamas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olive-capped warbler (Setophaga pityophila) is a species of New World warbler that is native to the western and eastern ends of Cuba as well as Grand Bahama and the Abaco Islands in the Bahamas
